The Cash Back Dollar earn rate for the following purchase categories: (i) Grocery Purchases, (ii) Gas & Electric Vehicle Charging Purchases, (iii) Public Transit Purchases, and (iv) Recurring Bill Payments and Streaming, Digital Gaming & Media Purchases is only available on the first $5,000 in annual Purchases in that category ("Annual Cap"). If your total Purchases in one of these categories (i) through (iv) exceeds the Annual Cap in a year, you will earn the Base Earn Rate on Purchases in that category for the remainder of the year. If you have any questions about the MCC that applies to a Purchase, contact TD at
1-800-983-8472.

You will receive an additional 30,000 WestJet points provided a total of $5,000 or more in qualifying net purchases and/or pre-authorized bill payment transactions are posted to your Credit Card Account within the Period. You will receive an additional 10,000 WestJet points up to sixteen (16) weeks after your Credit Card Account has been open for one (1) year.
Welcome_Bonus_Eligbility: Only the primary cardholder on the Credit Card Account is eligible for this offer. Additional cardholders(s) (co-applicant and authorized user(s)), as well as existing cardholders on any RBC Royal Bank personal credit card account, transferring to a WestJet RBC World Elite Mastercard during the Offer Period, are not eligible for this offer.
Features: Earn 2 points for every dollar you spend on WestJet flights, WestJet Vacations, and Sunwing Vacations. Earn 2 points for every dollar you spend at grocery stores and on transportation including gas, EV charging, public transit and rideshare. Earn 1.5 points for every dollar you spend on all other everyday purchases
Features_Detailed: Earn (i) 2 WestJet points per $1 spent on eligible WestJet flights, WestJet Vacations packages and Sunwing Vacations packages, and (ii) 1.5 WestJet points per $1 spent on all other purchases when you pay with your WestJet RBC World Elite Mastercard. Earn (i) 2 WestJet points per $1 spent on eligible purchases in the following categories: Grocery Stores and Supermarkets, Gas, Electric Vehicle Charging, and Public Transit including Rideshare, and (ii) 1.5 WestJet points per $1 spent on all other purchases when you pay with your WestJet RBC World Elite Mastercard.
Card_Eligibility: This card requires a minimum personal income of $80,000 or a minimum household income of $150,000.
